description: Refactor the 'demodb' database schema (User: root, Pass: GymAnything123!) from a flat structure to a graph structure by normalizing the 'Type' property in the 'Countries' class. Create a new Vertex class named 'Regions' with a String property 'Name' (including a UNIQUE index) and a new Edge class named 'InRegion'. Migrate the existing data by creating a 'Regions' vertex for every unique 'Type' found in 'Countries' and connecting each country to its corresponding region vertex via an 'InRegion' edge, ensuring no duplicate Region vertices are created.
